textByHashes.b39bb6da5ee7d4f3cf2a74d908c97c1d1d7b56c0: Sorry, but I can't let you talk to the prisoners.
textByHashes.dccdb64129f0bb3f291b641cd46355170c2560cd: Ah yes! You're the one that helped with Councillor Hughes. Carry on then.
textByHashes.2542e2a0320261a689b75850d3c92d24ded9594e: You have been warned before... leave, now...
textByHashes.1ae4c19e6d719e28a7a8feb8f19ed6ea6c59047f: Please don't disturb me, I've got to keep any eye out for suspicious individuals.
textByHashes.cc3da66acd79dba9d984cf6ea410706deb479bc4: Halt. I need to conduct a search on you. There have been reports of someone bringing a virus into this area of Varrock.
textByHashes.3aa68015436e52abdb54426ac3a76f8da1aa17f2: Oh... Er... Just delivering some supplies to the guards at the gates.
textByHashes.44ad73757666dece1d40f610c9f781bef9b8d171: I'm here aren't I? If you're not happy, maybe you should have been the one to steal the uniforms!
textByHashes.7630322c062fc7e7c489f0c87465dc3abad30465: Good luck. You're going to need it.
textByHashes.8e4bf8f829e18200ac9f458fee04cc1c5723328e: Hey! Ordinary members aren't allowed here!
textByHashes.ba3776dc647301e08f4c726f3cf9e307fe66f03e: Go back upstairs and I'll say nothing about it. But if any of the other guards see you you're in big trouble!
textByHashes.0a14bef5e4bbdd8328b5c00f8b73f368f6ce40da: Ordinary members aren't allowed in this area. Get back to the cave above.
textByHashes.8df2b3f056ab0f7ca695529d6919e70d48a9ca35: Hey! Where do you think you're going?
textByHashes.d81460d890f032ba99d1a18a1c8ca2d20a2238c1: Things aren't easy for the family, especially since they never got closure. They're getting through it, though.
textByHashes.3bccd3555e9e6e614d9104fa1e3e32e7aece9106: A Mahjarrat? I don't even know what one of those is... You say he escaped?
textByHashes.9902e2986653250deadbaacab4c1efcb7e5c6876: Well I wish you luck in your search, adventurer. Thank you for the update.
textByHashes.3a1e814620aa1fd7970f085f50ab5d98db34f261: Hello again adventurer. Still hanging around here eh? I'll be honest, I'm glad someone of your ability is around to assist me in case of trouble.
textByHashes.c7978443a3936f942f7961b818e9d87cbf73331d: Hello adventurer. I hear you accused Jones the butler of being an accomplice of that loony cult. Is that true?
textByHashes.6c4e7db8dcf6a5f582cda66ed95c45554e23f98c: You have my utter faith adventurer. I can't openly defy my employer, Sir Ceril, but I'd like you to know that I think you're on the right track there.
textByHashes.e493e8e20621d2346b79498a50c0695ff176bc0b: You've already proven to me that you're a law-abiding citizen. Besides, I always found it suspicious that Jones would just show up here on the doorstep the very day after the old butler died in such suspicious
textByHashes.cf7670eb2208a2271ab21e5b083af803a60fa298: circumstances. Good luck in clearing your name. You have my support.
textByHashes.e0c6cde09910b34cffc61b25c8a44a8fa4b63d34: Now now. Come along quietly. There'll be no revenge where YOU'RE going - Port Sarim Jail.
textByHashes.f87b6ee5e19f1d2abe34c47142f02d6b2d3afb90: Hello. I hear tell you're after that loony cult who broke in the other night. It always gladdens me when civilians assist the law like this.
textByHashes.d3f8617c5657e725a337965cde4a48a15cef8c0c: Hello. The sarge is furious with me! Apparently those loony cultists have been back somehow without me noticing! I got a right roasting earlier...
textByHashes.c56b105503e8988d7d97a4e93c2300c1fc915612: I don't exactly know what they got up to in the house... but that's besides the point. Sir Ceril was extremely upset, and I don't blame him.
textByHashes.c6424337cf1d5671cf3d289d3fab89727270cf23: Hello again adventurer. Still hanging around here eh? Let me know if you spot any of those loony cultists sniffing around.
textByHashes.ebf86e2d0e57d664b599bc6e1dcc156cfb1709b5: Hello adventurer. I hope you find the cult soon we have a horrible suspicion that there's been another burglary.
textByHashes.ca801ed45e7440de1dfe937a2e39183f0a2ee5d6: Yes, it is. What's worse is I have no idea how they keep doing it. It's like they do it under my very nose!
textByHashes.b8f2d10a22cecf5718d45e6aae922be31df2c28e: Hello there. I hear you're after that cult who broke in the other night. It always gladdens me when civilians assist the law like this.
textByHashes.1a880c1cadc8375811f38c31e722e501b44c0a8c: Hello, adventurer. I hear you accused Jones of being part of that cult. Is that true?
textByHashes.f7fbafde12f86f1f96926b629866f289a9a73fc5: You have my utter faith, adventurer. I can't openly defy Sir Ceril, but I'd like you to know that I think you're on the right track with this.
textByHashes.b554b0e6a50778db496da7fcabd9e267a564e512: I always found it suspicious that Jones would just show up on the doorstep the very day after the old butler died. Good luck in clearing your name
textByHashes.7e8483c1114c3df8522ade9fbea20fdf099b7a92: Well look who it is! Good to see you managed to clear your name. I always had faith in you!
textByHashes.a25233a8f455abd814355d8496d4055a3f8546df: Indeed! For now at least, everything is back to normal.
textByHashes.13bb55020d7241b0093b1352a40def3a298023ae: Today is a dark day. Those cultists have been back, and this time they've gone further than ever before! Murder! We can't afford to keep letting them get away with this.
textByHashes.1c95746e52f43413f6c6ae0aa07de46916a19fb7: Hello, adventurer. I hope you find the cult soon. We have a horrible suspicion that there's been another burglary.
textByHashes.da142e8b2e781186d7f2b01fe5641ab121a4dcde: Yes, it is. The thing is, we can't even work out what they've taken! It's all very odd.
textByHashes.64d0a8de304577627b672f985ceda0216733c82f: Good day, . I'm afraid we meet under strange circumstances again.
textByHashes.2ef0b1b226ce3ea1df0e26e863469c27f2661960: Finally, that man serves a purpose. I'm glad to have your help. I'm baffled again and my hands are tied.
textByHashes.eb3e8aab573e138db7702268a12cd11247ca907f: The Sinclairs have disappeared, though I'm not sorry to see them go, but what worries me is the disappearance of King Arthur and his knights around the same time.
textByHashes.f5e2997e16e098401752de45aa61e58dc0b5e9a4: No, there's no evidence to suggest that. It never sat well with the Sinclair children when their old man gave the castle to King Arthur and
textByHashes.faed607347d8784f409db8dd9800dec154f71da2: moved the family to this mansion. I suspect the murder of old Sinclair was just the first step in a deeper plot to retake their 'birthright'.
textByHashes.2f0e3cf93c0a72d61a654b2039c98920f0a4634b: That's the problem. The Seers' Village council has forbidden the guards from breaking into Camelot or the Sinclair Mansion for further investigation.
textByHashes.b4d90dc944c4848d9b18c1b34f3e9282898ec51e: They claim it's a breach of privacy or something like that. My suspicions mean nothing without proof to back them up, but I can't get proof without losing my job.
textByHashes.2df1e6666a03706da0c9f0a851c67cb8ed03bf6b: Exactly! I'm sure you'll manage to find a way into the house.
textByHashes.4b0951a88caa3602d04794d4044f1bdf35749729: Any luck getting into the mansion? Did you get some evidence?
textByHashes.bb27d1ef884d78d7bbdccfdfe57598d99e6fec1f: A form? What does this prove?
textByHashes.9cbdfcc52ad7d7d45d87fdd9adc9b73e6ca1c486: Ah! Of course. Unfortunately, they filled in all of the form except where their new address is.
textByHashes.0922ce6262cf88dd2b1cbbf54d7ea142e08d3e05: Aha! They've gone to the desert. They're meeting up with a camel.
textByHashes.98f8ed8e8c4518237e72188d2a9e87d4127edfa3: Oh, right. Well, it connects them to King Arthur, but it doesn't prove that they had any bad intent towards him. For all we know they were going to a party.
textByHashes.e8ceee9f10700f4c00a730a1c312bf612a8bd32e: Hmm, this armour resembles Black Knight armour. The only Black Knights on this side of White Wolf Mountain are those that work for Morgan Le Faye.
textByHashes.e7969e70affb4fdc0693b0235ae2492e5f59b236: Oh right! With this evidence and the note you brought me, we know they had intentions to do harm to King Arthur.
textByHashes.f33d4d7b374917e939fa75f61ae0105f95ea71ae: Thank you, . We have all the proof we need to present to the Seers' Village council that something suspicious is going on.
textByHashes.3578c3bcda9251afc4de3920ef4d0e6ad7b36304: They'll review the evidence and hopefully give me permission to take a team to Camelot. It shouldn't be too difficult to get to the bottom of this.
textByHashes.1dd1c771a6ebc2c8759a6213322af7a2bef39f95: Oh the Seers' Village council convenes in a month or so, I'll present it then. No doubt they'll want a few days to review the evidence.
textByHashes.7e415d86d5ecbfe463dc6ff7db41e84720327de4: We'll go sometime after that...if none of the other guards are on holiday. There are only four of us, ya know.
textByHashes.caf4d996b2c46baec32d64377614a6f679039b35: I have to follow procedure, my hands are tied.
textByHashes.f00e6716ac18ad33cdf730a93bd9fb2acab53127: However, were a rogue adventurer to take the matter in to their own hands...
textByHashes.6132b5dc8816d6367db3baf98cd050d737bfd7d4: Well, if I were them, I would learn as much as I can about the Sinclair family history.
textByHashes.4bc38c7c3a6424cdcdfc73fab5aa6975ffead7e6: Well, often the best historians are the town gossips. I'd start there. Good luck, brave adventurer!
textByHashes.d68fa3508fbc493ee340e7936ec531f9ba20939d: Find out all you can about the Sinclair family history. I'm sure there is a clue or two there.
textByHashes.b52a83d3a8d45df20537b9a575660929fab654f4: That Sinclair woman is such a pain! She keeps demanding gourmet meals and ridiculous things like silk sheets.
textByHashes.d784c8e5efde1c984ddfd5fa733978d4d0bd4707: Go ahead. It means she won't be demanding things from me.
textByHashes.d29b3d8295696a17d7f1e4a1058001e9ad57560d: Mother said to join the guards, see the world! What do I end up doing? Guarding some stuck-up brat in a backwater village full of hippies.
textByHashes.dc31e625c108e8ba2830f60bbcd3212d8275fe55: Ha, ha, ha. That's a good one. Whoo, I needed a laugh.
textByHashes.4b59586bdaabbfce4a018456b28432b2100f094a: But the proof against her is conclusive. Someone saw her tamper with Sinclair's dinner!
textByHashes.1fb4c6e0cbc0230dfaa1f1fd6395e44f69176617: This is a sad, sad day. I can't stop you from doing it, but I wish with all my heart you wouldn't. You'll be aiding a murderer.
textByHashes.05c67c3e61cea323192b9bb262fcbc3b067ae7cb: I'm afraid I'm too busy to speak to you right now.
textByHashes.0a451b4c21c65ed94001bd922740d89b550a1598: What are you doing in the city, surface goblin?
textByHashes.afdabb1fb82552239da8f0e41913b5832bd9065d: Zanik's not any kind of commander. She'd never fit into a command structure, she's too independant.
textByHashes.ac51fcaab469e804edc8ab71bb45fb7f4d277f8e: Anyway, I think I saw her with Oldak earlier. You should check his lab.
textByHashes.1d41ce923565b871507c4f29723e93246efc781f: A surface goblin in the city? That's against the rules!
textByHashes.40744c8da708a29cbd5e8a90a882e7ebf5c05391: Hmm... Carry on, then. But I'm keeping an eye on you.
textByHashes.8e48f18997e7e2670bd1673d0a0948be3798f91c: I'm keeping an eye on you, surface gobiln.
textByHashes.2563e4748b5a2c6c5ca867a331c93e1e6e3bc2b9: You go away! Only tribe come in here!
textByHashes.cfb7305cb1ad25001d1777125dc28d7294af3827: No, outerlander, I'm guarding this mountain pass from trolls and inquisitive people like you.
textByHashes.dcf65d2b109310137e821b0667e9a3c8a7f41b65: If the chieftain would let me, I would correct that oversight.
textByHashes.a6e7a27083c3aa8fc71d0d9f080e17c30e59a2ac: Go, outerlander, and do not hurry back.
textByHashes.a4675fe1005aa6651a637eec612a245cb94eedf9: I suppose I might as well let you pass now, since I can't seem to stop you anyway.
textByHashes.495e162a87ad787cd7303f76f05dcb5f6596cd6e: Just remember that I'm watching you.
textByHashes.e0f4174fb021718064914ce1222e98f53fcb96b0: What do you have there, outerlander? It's not our rock, is it?
textByHashes.bbbaf6eb25e282dc8e572fd8e3f91c99126ea939: Alright, you be on your way then.
textByHashes.51ccb8cb6cc95a26f22b28af73df5b2bce4b4dfe: Oh, it's terrible! Lord Sinclair has been murdered and we don't have any clues as to who or why. We're totally baffled!
textByHashes.9692e1b757263e43d413cc274aa2403b2cc39333: If you can help us we will be very grateful.
textByHashes.23fc71035e12cef8aab6ba1ff24a633c20c8f8d7: Look around and investigate who might be responsible. The Sarge said every murder leaves clues to who done it, but frankly we're out of our depth here.
textByHashes.99179ec72f1326bd7572897005fef2155fc32a70: Get lost then, this is private property! ...Unless you'd like to be taken in for questioning yourself?
textByHashes.ffddcef8f7531d7ffc5ce7a28351e43142dffe41: Well, it's all very mysterious. Mary, the maid, found the body in the study next to his bedroom on the east wing of the ground floor.
textByHashes.e981bdbb3d3fc3699e9617c6cae984dbedae63b1: The door was found locked from the inside, and he seemed to have been stabbed, but there was an odd smell in the room. Frankly, I'm stumped.
textByHashes.e9e3de9331fd9218cc78ebe5a9bd6e5ce3b163ac: Really? That was quick work! Who?
textByHashes.f8960f1647aa6cc6c1bd760dd456d0dc79f8ba03: That's what we were thinking too. That someone broke in to steal something, was discovered by Lord Sinclair, stabbed him and ran.
textByHashes.b6aaecbd29ecbe38f1580e409ce4fdc2b6a01628: It's odd that apparently nothing was stolen though... Find out something has been stolen,
textByHashes.c5393b7850938e9237120b9f5f02145566357b2d: and the case is closed, but the murdered man was a friend of the King, and it's more than my job's worth not to investigate fully.
textByHashes.35e4b805666d58be083bae0e9670985bd1f10d5b: I hope you have proof to that effect. We have to arrest someone for this and it seems to me that only the actual murderer would gain by falsely accusing someone.
textByHashes.20cd96ff011e51d40c6115b6d6137b25458d3b6f: Although having said that the butler is kind of shifty looking...
textByHashes.d9b28f8548fb635a8a3cc0aaa1fcc66dcb725bc0: Great work. Show me the evidence, and we'll take them to the dungeons.
textByHashes.3f0b93c0e6de45c2c575ae9d6ddfe2cf50291384: You DO have evidence of their crime, right?
textByHashes.30545b057d0d8a6a289517dc04499be489626d9b: Tch. You wouldn't last a day in the guards with sloppy thinking like that. Come see me when you have some proof of your accusations.
textByHashes.ee384b762e616c56fc02d4111dd17dbbcfc69772: That's some good work there. I guess it wasn't a servant. You still haven't proved who did do it though.
textByHashes.0aeca59b57605348a2718e37f38e28d7cbf4f8c7: Oh really? How did you get that?
textByHashes.e638ab05efbe01aacf624c88380c1a20a08d2438: Hmm. That's some good detective work there. We need more evidence before we can close the case though. Keep up the good work!
textByHashes.f31acf0b6fa62c4d5fc289acc27442bca3afb9b5: ... I'm impressed. How on earth did you think of something like that? I've never heard of such a technique for finding criminals before!
textByHashes.eac8da1e951cc5c8dd5c88beb17391b27e110b44: This will come in very handy in the future but we can't arrest someone on just this. I'm afraid you'll still need to find more evidence before we can close this case completely.
textByHashes.24c8d513d56588ac748e4231d94f925a26f5105b: You do? That's excellent work. Let's hear it then.
textByHashes.4b8dee1234476cc930c7fd776a897e59ad7654f0: Yes, that makes sense. But who did do it then?
textByHashes.3c3ed7e695bff96a2db4ffdcbafad21ff66f5fac: Yes, I'd have to agree with that... but we need more evidence!
textByHashes.90fedb882c2698496f1c0d500145fdae62db9bae: Excellent work - have you considered a career as a detective? But I'm afraid it's still not quite enough...
textByHashes.ae51fd640564173e1ebf5b56bbc1a39ae47643f9: Yes. There's no doubt about it. It must have been Anna who killed her father. All of the guards must congratulate you on your excellent work in helping us to solve this case.
textByHashes.43c90a0f157cdcc78f4036fe28dcd3b8fee7c675: Yes. There's no doubt about it. It must have been Bob who killed his father. All of the guards must congratulate you on your excellent work in helping us to solve this case.
textByHashes.8d71bfc3f0823354277d8c2082ab042a9256d092: Yes. There's no doubt about it. It must have been Carol who killed her father. All of the guards must congratulate you on your excellent work in helping us to solve this case.
textByHashes.f23d4495de21a209dbe4830ffb374bf5acf65b26: Yes. There's no doubt about it. It must have been David who killed his father. All of the guards must congratulate you on your excellent work in helping us to solve this case.
textByHashes.b987e1e29f2b86d211bf3717bf8f6affdf830b9b: Yes. There's no doubt about it. It must have been Elizabeth who killed her father. All of the guards must congratulate you on your excellent work in helping us to solve this case.
textByHashes.504b21413b2c7a520d2232d6efaca8f7fd45a3ae: Yes. There's no doubt about it. It must have been Frank who killed his father. All of the guards must congratulate you on your excellent work in helping us to solve this case.
textByHashes.b7ae44a3f5f1dd4b379f20bb754466a3cd95cdd5: We don't have many murders here in Gielinor and I'm afraid we wouldn't have been able to solve it by ourselves. We will hold her here under house arrest until such time as we bring her to trial.
textByHashes.bf91db692ca8e8d7dc2cab1b8d6b2dd8e4f932d1: You have our gratitude, and I'm sure the rest of the family's as well, in helping to apprehend the murderer. I'll just take the evidence from you now.
textByHashes.8ad73b7146a9fe8f4811fc9d28a04ab03228a262: Please accept this reward from the family!
textByHashes.7a4a2a047eadcfa2319d8d6f449712093ffdcd75: Excellent work on solving the murder! All of the guards I know are very impressed, and don't worry, we have the murderer under guard until they can be taken to trial.
textByHashes.6479e430263b9ed16993c070e0bbe9cca43fe83c: No, your work here is done.
textByHashes.28a5831b62454cce65ce1e8cfbd1579f9c553f3b: Apologies, but I was sent to tell you that one of the creatures from the ruins managed to bypass our defenses.
textByHashes.5a3fafa799c5a392e498d4ce7cfca2fad22de670: It escaped through the mountain's outflow spring, to the north east.
textByHashes.100d8538e5207dd2115d653ec484f9d75190d186: At least I'm not guarding the market.
textByHashes.0e2e374870295c16f3d161a9e6bc82e1f39c9d7d: 10 green bottles... or was it 9 green bottles?
textByHashes.967c1f0ac50ca9744875d9240c6e07f9ca5fb4fa: I wonder if Ali Morissane is hiring?
textByHashes.e711eac76ddac835d1291463e10e33de54f5384e: These night shifts just go on and on.
textByHashes.0b88f2e4a4ca0b997ad1f384fc0a0db53456f7e9: Sorry, but nobody's allowed down there by order of the King.
textByHashes.201f1a62da8005a7f364c0f9a7aa19badbd6b7ee: You're the Regent? Well, I didn't vote for you.
textByHashes.6d866036e5033c823ec971f8db59fd6f4993d1d7: Sorry, 'Regent', nobody can go into the dungeons without the King's say-so.
textByHashes.789930f4325ada586f91b3c81b2a2bd7b76da2bc: If the King came and told me, then I'd believe it.
textByHashes.9f4b502c428f5cec97de869bb6c6e30332c1ed4e: Or, if he can't come here himself, I suppose a royal proclamation would be fine.
textByHashes.d141846bc27796ff5240d06f6f38c6e0596801a1: No, just his signature and a statement saying you're really the Regent would do.
textByHashes.4984461e9e5c82149557abb73ceb636ef8deb014: Hmm... all seems to be in order.
textByHashes.b58f88348998020f3756e2858c4314bce9a17523: All right, your Highness, you're free to go down there.
textByHashes.89fac67ca7a5140b568a31fecfb6e6f56c8b69e7: Try not to be eaten by monsters.
textByHashes.5bc50dfff42d69fdb48a8692a9160588603a5476: Hello down there! Are you all right?
textByHashes.de2a7b14c7658356e1dc2d451094b81532480f24: I'm up here, above this hole.
textByHashes.05526c98aaf23419b3dc3cf7d5de23a8d6cc131f: I've thrown down a rope - you sounded like you were trapped in there.
textByHashes.51c3ec0914e7b6768774bc7df833d803bc1fad95: I'm surprised you managed to get out of there without breaking any bones.
textByHashes.69a176a817a002c4b8801ad8acaafdcdce0d3b2f: Still, I can't let you go back down there until the Queen says it's safe.
textByHashes.dde35f29c12981435f0f9ce0ed6b8a1e8cbb233d: Oh, so this is yours? You must have dropped it around here.
textByHashes.e59eb9731e24cc73f3e4b15854c8936adf439c0d: Seems rather heavy. Take better care of it this time.
textByHashes.606bd0c2562e1dde0289470abe108c98a097ebad: Wait a minute! You can't go down there.
textByHashes.9684a8ac1ad4e78bc94102e81c71c7aa9c6396d2: Yes, and I'm surprised you managed to get out of there without breaking any bones.
textByHashes.856b816a175c7c4dd0a00969591c922d03e2577e: Hey! Come out here. We need to talk!
textByHashes.0af33758b90085697d8a26a6caa24a6dba52af83: Hey! I need to talk to you!
textByHashes.3fa68844e056576a1f62ee8f91dfb1d73c02e04c: Yes, you. I have some questions.
textByHashes.eec99fa9133e3941ee93dd8cb636f8daa2db103e: You were recently hired by Sir Ceril Carnillean, correct?
textByHashes.4502fff3d6c469914f90390f548da5f2d7101435: And have you had any contact with the Carnilleans since your success?
textByHashes.9d75daa32f3ed21c9b14e4814ca2cb4cf642beda: And have you had any contact with the Carnilleans since your failure?
textByHashes.b959a33c569b6e866565f9fa801a58a06030c008: An unthinkable crime has taken place, and as someone who has recently had contact with the Carnilleans, you are one of our suspects.
textByHashes.29b7e641a097e782a0b3cb152e315fce7754656a: Until I am satisfied that you were not involved, I can't say.
textByHashes.e91f76a4ec67a72548bfc3fef565148dc2c5d7fb: Sorry about all this. I'm pretty confident you had nothing to do with any of it, but I need to put on a good show for Lady Carnillean.
textByHashes.18be0e5c432f564f47b1dd96f31be964ef9121ac: Well I must say adventurer, that is quite the alibi. You clearly had no involvement in this horrific crime.
textByHashes.856844e373c14a316b5e880c5c52d12e13c06528: And what's that? You want to help us find the culprit? How generous of you!
textByHashes.b9679461fd647f02fb9c53c6a3c4c2c03c7c6250: Excellent! Please join me upstairs when you're ready to begin.
textByHashes.7bd832910f4dac888b23da246b95e765e91dacd2: Let me run you through what happened before you start inspecting things.
textByHashes.43b0760495fbba7228ae7041773bf3f9ce4164ca: I was hoping you could help work that out.
textByHashes.4f552be24ab774964a04507e2c39a544635aa5ca: It happened in the early hours of the morning. According to Lady Carnillean, Sir Ceril heard a noise coming from Butler Jones' old room. He got up to investigate.
textByHashes.21b316ce05ec3f73564d32922b672e473863a6b6: After a few moments, she heard Sir Ceril shout something, followed by a scream. She went to see what was happening, and this is what she found.
textByHashes.a28ee25a59aa29e01df0e2cb6e5393e3f0f2e5f5: I was the guard on duty last night. I was stationed out front as usual. Claus, the family chef, was down in the kitchen preparing an early breakfast for Sir Ceril.
textByHashes.a0359afd405a9a77e458904fcd4bef5a1fde2f14: Young Philipe was in bed. He slept through the entire thing.
textByHashes.149efa8a5daf0db2c1897c61208484f52e32a79f: Jones is behind bars, but many of his fellow cultists are still at large. Perhaps this was an act of revenge on their part.
textByHashes.ce3ec3047cd83be485c8a068ec00f91cee8cc409: It happened in the early hours of the morning. According to Lady Carnillean, Sir Ceril heard a noise coming from Butler Jones' room. He got up to investigate.
textByHashes.0e52a669817ba306334eaa800ca0816de59c3f84: Young Philipe was in bed. He slept through the entire thing. Jones himself was downstairs at the time, but he vanished before we could question him.
textByHashes.1b4ef362e3c2df822c0f787e5d66ade93e90f431: Indeed. That, along with the murder occurring in his room, makes him a prime suspect.
textByHashes.77a5de9cf49bf9d99ee18967bf43ecf92c07d6d8: We also have those cultists that broke in a while back. Following his disappearance, we can't help but wonder if Jones might have been in league with them...
textByHashes.6083294dbc05028cc66b2a34dbabe5999562fa99: There's a few other things to note, but it's probably best if you have a look around the crime scene before we go any further.
textByHashes.10e8fd0b65d246f524a4f6f0f46e18cb6d64b965: Are you done looking around the crime scene?
textByHashes.61be1fa7112e5725ffb31bad4177c0e4d337013c: Not to worry. Take all the time you need.
textByHashes.11c30fad887ea9304f6c8865e6dc6f42dfc97b0c: So someone broke in from the outside, something may have been stolen from a hidden room upstairs, and Sir Ceril was stabbed in the back. All useful information, but none of it gives us anything definitive.
textByHashes.977ce117557adfe9386413db7a8726e08068bec0: Thankfully, we do have one more lead that might hold some promise. Take a look at this.
textByHashes.16e0cabbdd6e30673ac0ce1e97d6ea95d8394730: I found this by the window. That skull on it is the symbol of the Khazard Army. There's also a name engraved into the back: 'Evelot'.
textByHashes.01404dc6c56b701a4ed2e4493f45dc9b30b22d23: While I agree, my superiors won't be happy if I open an investigation into a member of the Khazard Army. I think you'll need to handle this bit yourself. Besides, I need to take care of matters here.
textByHashes.6136c1bceef58d2a85e45bb935fad1d5024ca7f4: If you want a place to start, I'd suggest the bar at the Fight Arena. Places like that are always good for gathering information.
textByHashes.f0cf9f6a915db130852881d9cfe491d741475552: They're definitely top suspects, but we don't have any actual evidence linking them to the crime. Until we do, this Evelot lead seems like a safer bet.
textByHashes.1eb4afe6c96d28099f40d896f1b3ababf0f0e34b: The matter is... complicated. On paper, General Khazard is an upstanding citizen, and his private army operates with approval from the crown. King Lathas even hired them for some peacekeeping once.
textByHashes.80da315a0e2afa9067f3e8a150d8699e336e8b76: It's fair to say that Khazard is a bit... controversial. His war with the gnomes is creating more than a few problems for Kandarin, not to mention the rumours about the people fighting in his arena...
textByHashes.ac8cc4160b6d1863e96ebdca6d4beef0b453d4f3: For now though, King Lathas considers him a valuable ally. As such, it is preferred we maintain a good relationship with him and his army.
textByHashes.0a75504ba0eb7baef33bbb15193b03f01e7424c0: Unlike his predecessor, King Thoros is keen to slowly distance himself from Khazard. However, in the meantime, we have to maintain a good relationship with him and his army.
textByHashes.8a96818c24e2f74af692f48d57d1fd561257ef38: No need to worry. Some of our best are already out searching for him. I'm sure he won't get far.
textByHashes.f561842809b33180326eed88f0948dd10e439b55: Your concern is appreciated, but they'll be fine. You're better off focusing on Evelot.
textByHashes.62acdb56dddc9b86c0f1afa9714d3392c3845d5e: I didn't see anyone leave or enter from the front of the building last night, so that makes sense. The window must have been their way in and out.
textByHashes.c9bb14ba878f67d59b10c13750a9e57b9eb69ed5: Agreed. Did you find anything else?
textByHashes.40fb8c3b73ee800f0c98defeb12c8e34e498d622: So he wasn't facing his killer. But if that were the case, why did Lady Carnillean say she heard him shouting? Surely he'd have been facing whoever he was shouting at.
textByHashes.977fa0bd5a7d89d2673416cfa3ffcc4b1d1acc01: Let's hope not. One killer on the loose is bad enough.
textByHashes.ec476184358cbe3634b8a3be99fe25c589fe8f06: Really? How odd. I'll make a note to look into that once we're done here.
textByHashes.b83818bcd22aa17e7de60309ab6ad87df1e2be06: Anyway, did you find anything else?
textByHashes.f76461bfa302a6b0d104b8393908050800787e00: A hidden room? What hidden room?
textByHashes.c810fd8445a6d708a6432ae259870e257dd518f3: Do you think they took anything from it?
textByHashes.8720da8cb4538ef60ed65a1a62b7be3f6012df06: This raises more questions than answers. Was this actually a murder, or just a robbery gone wrong? And how was there a hidden room that we knew nothing about?
textByHashes.496698f0cdba5a4b9813878a84f471e55b93697f: Oh. Well don't be gone too long. We have work to do here.
textByHashes.3f52f807c37d96239c3d986161cc7a7f28f2ddfe: So did you find anything of note in your investigation?
textByHashes.1789edf6a1597426eb5eaff6fd40f50bc9793b92: Hello there. You should head over to the bar at the Fight Arena and see what you can learn about this Evelot.
textByHashes.e7f1621a444038db1e180e7248ffa013ffd1ee62: Hello there. Any luck at the Fight Arena?
textByHashes.30f9b2f6d3c47a6ef4cafaf4cfab7bfa71f1e197: Well, let me know once you have something.
textByHashes.a4100f1df75fd9e7bcdf9e12e473b5d44d7972e2: Interesting. So what do you plan to do now?
textByHashes.f89535738be560580adeb5c601b8a15cf414f06b: Well you'll be pleased to know we were able to track down Jones. He's already admitted to being part of that cult. For that alone he'll be going away for a long time. However, he's staying silent on the murder.
textByHashes.0ed86e3de4ab854f87b5c4b09abe37d229a7e46c: Really? He seems like the obvious suspect. If not him, then who?
textByHashes.2995ef5f48af23ac509d43f5f1bb9d5330f28786: Go right ahead. Lady Carnillean and Philipe are just inside, and you'll find Claus down in the kitchen.
textByHashes.1877f19bfea5561cf5e6f94c689da541e25cb9a3: Hello there. Any luck with your investigation?
textByHashes.2fb097e43204beca1cc9847cc9a9c3e851ff3e1b: Excellent. I hope it goes well.
textByHashes.28f1d8885b32b77f2630339180f0c56ee6317df5: You're back. Any luck with your investigation?
textByHashes.76800f1dea93c90bcca0831ad884939c9bf7ea35: An assassin? Why would an assassin want Sir Ceril dead?
textByHashes.6330b45958ed72fa5e08e2334df19ab4e47f3de8: Well I guess I'd better go and file my report on all this. My superiors aren't going to be happy.
textByHashes.6d9e3a9930921aa75e35ee947c26fe4dce14b3a6: Still, thank you for all your help. Even though we weren't successful, I very much appreciate you trying. If you discover anything new about this assassin, do let me know.
textByHashes.bdcf3e92dc6d5b2a7e298004dba3c61612006577: Well I guess I'd better go and file my report on all this. My superiors aren't going to be happy. First the Jones situation, now this.
textByHashes.2018b609e54a4fe48bd2dbda7016c537007684d1: Ah, of course, you don't know. Jones was found dead in his cell. Poison by the looks of it.
textByHashes.d668d48e4a869eae4937c6afaa9da6824c42a942: Yes, quite the mess. Assumption is the cult are to blame. Tying up loose ends and all that.
textByHashes.d0eb2542c7143dd3208f4fb49d529e23c7300c76: Anyway, thank you for all your help. Even though we weren't successful, I still very much appreciate it. If you discover anythiing new about this assassin, do let me know.
textByHashes.b434508383a2b1948aca6e9ac7605405da357835: I'll let you be on your way. All the best out there.
textByHashes.8589db992422f88e4ecded4a6e7e25ce3a5b5c24: We can hope. If you do ever hear any more about him, be sure to let us know.
textByHashes.71e75ac9463281b5a249c4911abcea1dc0ebe0cb: Halt, in the name of King Gjuki Sorvott IV.
textByHashes.a7558c3f3f2b1ce8d3c09849a86f099823a895f7: Actually his juggling was quite funny. Shame about the accident though.
textByHashes.7f58ed7271f86e90dcb8f157df673a581a7856f2: Prepare for the arrival of Queen Zyanyi Arkan!
textByHashes.a267febe86d43bd52602ee94b178dc68d3feb89a: You won't be needing that water anymore!
textByHashes.d673b96981654d7bccfc23d4a7e69bfbfb5a72c7: Okay men, we need to teach this person a lesson
textByHashes.f6df20bb5c3b1a43383d7a7f7833e0ae7d3616f2: What are you doing in here?
textByHashes.d94d3c74feac41c631290d36dc71ca0832503893: Into the cell you go! I hope this teaches you a lesson.
textByHashes.e4a56b85b93d5a1bf9924a90342a36e54d72ef9f: Oi, what are you two doing?
textByHashes.0c1d39efc43c18050c1e8591f1e5a22a24e62d2f: Okay... so move along and get on with your work.
textByHashes.7222f0fcf16fde8aa5b7dc2527aac4fb2cf4d332: Oh, you want to work in another area of the mine eh? --The guard seems pleased with his rhetorical question.-- Well, I can understand that! A change is as good as a rest they say.
textByHashes.f9ffa2e6906744caf06d6144de8bb21e1f54300b: You miserable whelp! Get back to work!
textByHashes.980579e67a19078f58f9e55d6f3a9504dc009e97: Of course I'm right. And what goes around comes around as they say. And it's been absolutely ages since I've had anything different to eat.
textByHashes.61ab6cb30a7dd6c8db149dedd83375d2c0bc3c27: What I wouldn't give for some whole, fresh, ripe and juicy pineapple for a change. And those Tenti's have the best pineapple in this entire area.
textByHashes.8b9cc6bba2b7cba19e63fa58a320124e19738340: I'm sure you get my meaning...
textByHashes.647362c358f9df7d7e4440d52af6dbb37e3924c2: Well, that's not my problem is it? Also, I know that you slaves trade your items down here. I'm sure that if you're resourceful enough, you'll come up with the goods.
textByHashes.0e7576dc349746f9bfd2c96b3394339fe6b69a91: Now, get along and do some work, before we're both in for it. And remember, I prefer my pineapples whole, not chopped up with all the juice gone.
textByHashes.8048619729b67380ac4cbf4a70672a7f42c36dbe: Okay, good then. And remember, I prefer my pineapples whole, not chopped up with all the juice gone.
textByHashes.0ddc66e447fdf924de7307cbb5e8636973130b1c: Well! You don't come from around here do you? The Tenti's are the nomadic people west of here. They live in tents, so we call them the Tenti's. They have great pineapples! I'm sure you get my meaning?
textByHashes.9b9d6579a09078de5e9fe6d70aa7a27dea6fa682: You're in some serious trouble now!
textByHashes.b94c331721720b470f4660e4e5ee5d0db05e018b: Yeuch! That's awful! That's not Tenti pineapple! It's got no juice! Get me some Tenti pineapple if you know what's good for you. A whole one so I can see that it's good!
textByHashes.67c7afa38a8eade59234f4bdb03bf1051412a5e4: Great! Just what I've been looking for! Mmmmmmm... Delicious!! This is soo nice! Mmmmm, Yummmm... Oh yes, this is great.
textByHashes.1f1f3bc24be9aa3b107f542d1160076fdd7310aa: Yes, yes, of course... a deal's a deal!
textByHashes.b69826e6695b57a5094f2336dce6e42fc3b2c86c: That pineapple was just delicious, many thanks. I don't suppose you could get me another? -- The guard looks at you pleadingly.
textByHashes.fd91a126c3d0ca0335922d71a5b80fad8150f8fa: Alright, alright, I was only asking!
textByHashes.685dd91fefd6c4d06b773a3a599cbd77b231d881: Yeah, whaddya want... get out of here!
textByHashes.bdcfd68ef079ef53b49f66c23ccc71d87012f806: Well... I guess that's okay, get on your way though.
textByHashes.9a504b59ca0d667d818b7555228ecc27ef4b103e: Why you ungrateful whelp.. I'll teach you some manners.
textByHashes.d99f3b73a02da3e306932dee5021c3da5019008d: Hey there, what do you want?
textByHashes.ca06d3e74c87e78d579b094a5b5a6bca128760a7: It is quite clearly a lift. Any fool can see that it's used to transport rock to the surface.
textByHashes.60704f183b582b7076d7f40286c95758751009fd: Of course not, you'd be doing me out of a job. Anyway, you haven't got any barrels that need to go to the surface.
textByHashes.00b00e5e8e1c36d0a78263095aae533152b77d45: Now, move along and get some work done before you get a good beating.
textByHashes.7e88664a16018061d8c11863af0d56b32e1a74ea: Oh, want a fight do you!
textByHashes.5d984313de74c889b4e9d1b50f70813cbf879cf1: Hey, move away from the gate. There's nothing interesting for you here.
textByHashes.380dc0a51f55ea3941acc0326324dd0fffb6daa8: Hey, move away from the gate. If you wanna get out you're gonna have to mine for it. You're gonna have to bring me 15 loads of rocks in one go!
textByHashes.96e3bc2c3468e5181e271f91eb47de353b1f123b: And then I'll let you out. You can go back to work with the other slaves then!
textByHashes.641da809549354f8e7554b7a0fdd9c53ea249f39: Okay, you've got all the rocks, you can go now, but keep your nose clean in future.
textByHashes.41ef922f955b8ab18350db5f3d789b9931c5af90: I heard that! So you used a key did you?!
textByHashes.6fe81478e8f2b8dc8943881042224baa2debd504: Right, we'll have that key off you!
textByHashes.9ae380502f8e84730d713256188cdef2b632c56e: I heard that! So you managed to sneak in did you!
textByHashes.72ce15542865e2280024d26a1c2423524e2888cf: Hey! What's going on here then?
textByHashes.456923ecd47f452712823490afad179e7600a4b2: Hey, that Barrel looks heavy, do you need a hand?
textByHashes.4f0193da2aaa51eb94dcd27f3dcf5521054a7b9c: ~ The guard looks around, surprised at Ana's outburst. ~ What was that?
textByHashes.ce3cc25ef3d128ed6b3dfa4600ecf5d89b33f9a6: I could have sworn I heard something!
textByHashes.c5c2d773b0260d4fb5229d10a813c68aa9b85b9b: Oh, right, how very nice of you to say so. -- The guard seems flattered. --
textByHashes.a5d943a5b8f098f734fc75345c530be31b3d94db: Anyway, let's get this barrel up to the surface, plenty more work for you to do!
textByHashes.a96e52a56bfa77d80ac2e48349ac2eae5eefb0d6: Oh, there's no one operating the lift up top, hope this barrel isn't urgent? You'd better get back to work!
textByHashes.1755da90017e9b939e0d0ac832731c4c8429e97f: I heard you say something, now spit it out!
textByHashes.970d6dfdbd95760600f1bc992ea293d3a3c403be: Ok, fair enough, I was only offering.
textByHashes.ec059e90a9b1d223f6a664431ce8171861533934: Hey, you'd better go and operate that lift yourself if you want that big heavy barrel to go anywhere.
textByHashes.224072187089f9888d1097158b6b7ce183e99093: Hey, where d'ya think you're going with that Barrel?
textByHashes.53d98089954cd9ea896b7df26e900b1309d08570: Cor! This barrel is really heavy! Have you been mining lead?
textByHashes.3080b5a081893816f7f2d5838d39ee560acb3c1d: Hey! Where d'ya think you're going with that barrel?
textByHashes.0f68c87589a303c9965843624b51bdb6f9a8830b: You should know that they go out on the cart!
textByHashes.58288b83019aa19d7253b86b66cd4d2b247d6ee2: Blimey - it's a jail break! Guards! Guards! Apprehend them!
textByHashes.f826bcbcde95b0a59cd496ed10e1e5791be88ded: They're making a break for it!
textByHashes.5871977c13942aaf0e6ab8b6f87ea828577a98eb: I'm afraid the King won't give an audience to anyone except a worthy hero.
textByHashes.3847988420dbe865dd29d02a4db085dff5ff9ecd: If you become a member of the Heroes' Guild, he will definitely grant you an audience.
textByHashes.8f6127f13cd810c13613a19908e4c1b1cd5ff6b2: I'm sorry, my Prince, but we're not sure. None of the attackers made it inside, but Metzli has disappeared.
textByHashes.0e28b2222b3b87c75181a5906f56d98551623090: Thankfully the blade missed his heart, but we should get him to the capital as soon as possible.
textByHashes.292f4e1f69dd28d7151052335d904e0db14997f3: Of course, my Prince. We'll go at once.
textByHashes.0176d40903aed3ef88b9f33a44c36578e9944211: You must pay a toll of 10 gold coins to pass.
textByHashes.f6a866bfb15f2a702f13955807841fb9f45aadd0: The money goes to the city of Al-Kharid.
textByHashes.73f6ad8fa40b8f5afdc96dddd290234252f87f3c: You may pass for free, you are a friend of Al-Kharid.
textByHashes.aaee8db23270082a53d70811cac47e761baa55c9: You may pass for free, for you are a friend of Al-Kharid, but your goblin friend must stay on this side.
textByHashes.3546d93c639d9d20239cd8d289ed321ff32bdf4d: Why do you think this gate is here, if not to keep the goblins out of Al Kharid?
textByHashes.f778f785cc0083e7e78b9a4bac4551ad26b86aed: Oi you! What are you doing on this side of the portal?
textByHashes.7da2c1a0155bce1ff8291f9771ccd41eefd53658: Go report to the Duke in the castle, the greater yolk didn't tell you to return.
textByHashes.45c33022917d2b873724ca837d12a4d1af28fd31: Why are you talking to me, go report to the Duke in the castle, the egg will find a way to deal with you.
textByHashes.7fbc963336d6e7ee8ba6636920061583f04c9a6b: You're free to do as you wish, but I'll be keeping my ears on you.
textByHashes.5e114ae893a420eb63bb9a99d5ae412e342f5c3b: You don't want to mess with me, human.
textByHashes.6e32795960b184e5c4c308be8e273c7b8ca4be2f: If you're thinking of trying anything, you'll quickly find yourself regretting it.
textByHashes.925a6e8c89f153bdd33dbc001d461a5fcf6c7b51: What do you think you're doing, human?
textByHashes.d4f9b44ccd55d4abf0859427327492a700f37e18: This isn't a house, it's a... Actually, human, it's none of your business!
textByHashes.105d9838c0bc01c086aff3b5c6a6b31df79238bb: Why don't you ask me again?!
textByHashes.87b983cef0a435c9cd17515aafd78e2dae97d069: Ask me another question! I dare you!
textByHashes.1de8772580a44a64ce293bfd74b42289388532d4: Hello there. I haven't seen you around here before. If you've come to admire the Carnillean family home, I must warn you not to cause any trouble.
textByHashes.05d3417aa38bf4074a58f7d5fbd400ed260575c2: Due to recent criminal activities against such prominent Ardougnians, I have been sent here on special guard duty to ensure the Carnilleans' security.
textByHashes.28e41871a9e4528bf68b3d0ae5f94935005b1b68: Anyone caught interfering with the person or possessions of any Carnilleans will be taken to jail so quickly that their feet won't even touch the floor!
textByHashes.021121539e669cf3691c4df412b917ee135a4b80: Hello, adventurer. It's a shame you never found that cult. We have a horrible suspicion that there's been another burglary.
textByHashes.ccfae1e5f0aeec3f790398297db8441fcdc3710b: I don't think so. Sir Ceril says you've done enough.
textByHashes.7e5fdecb473eedf793ce8824d9ea009d7147f5bf: Don't you try anything, surface-dweller. I'm keeping an eye on you.
textByHashes.62caa4968aa399ca4ba9ba7454902739b181c151: Welcome, surface-dweller, to the hidden city of Dorgesh-Kaan!
textByHashes.3448292512e00baa0ab26f690ae7bf3aacecd2f5: I don't want to be unfriendly, but I can't help noticing that since surface-dwellers started coming into the city there has been an increase in CRIME!
textByHashes.7c761d6c3dec70f529355e2190b1cecf8aa3a1e2: Surface-dweller! I don't know how you got into the city, but you will never escape!
textByHashes.457d1412c18648a5a6d4a81c1ea21d8411db4e82: You are. I just wanted to say that. And now that you're allowed into the city, I'll never be able to!
textByHashes.7d3d8788cd006de0caa234c1796f55d81b2bcb95: This is a restricted area. You can only enter under the authority of King Lathas.
textByHashes.2dbc63141ee030555329eaeee3991a72f0f24ec4: In this day and age we're all soldiers. No time to waste gassing, Fight! Fight! Fight!
textByHashes.e2acd4e29b1e25e9fb5e5b0f09b09f1088ed789c: Well hello brave warrior. These ogres have been terrorising the area, they've eaten four children this week alone.
textByHashes.4a82d3cd2b494b24c58d837e73fb5f84853d9ff6: So we decided to use them for target practice. A fair punishment.
textByHashes.0b63e45e49c057a258241d378e59354d69a0ec87: What do you want? Leave us be!
textByHashes.f9a7f4487726c0b71034ab9e7edcbdb2f324fe2f: Welcome to the Seers' Village courthouse. Court is not in session today, so you're not allowed downstairs.
textByHashes.3be587b0ccd0b0d04c14f65b04cc65a2d67c96b9: The Seers' Village courthouse. We give all criminals a fair trial, by a jury of their peers. Or whoever we can round up from the pub.
textByHashes.e40fb67bb6bc1d02946c30dcb6b3d8eacad57216: I know. We guards usually stay by banks and shops, but I got sent all the way out here to keep an eye on the brigands loitering just south of here.
textByHashes.60e8ef69c1fa9838b75b77987eb2ccc7c578ded1: It's not too bad. At least I don't get attacked so often out here. Guards in the cities get killed all the time.
textByHashes.d1c4efbd76e0bc280b37d7a3cd79adca747750b4: Don't distract me while I'm on duty! This mine has to be protected!
textByHashes.0773a75abe266418bb3ebb72d257be8dd7c22d73: Goblins! They wander everywhere, attacking anyone they think is small enough to be an easy victim. We need more cannons to fight them off properly.
textByHashes.9cfb966bd2019f7c414a0337b735fcb4db17f67a: A new cannon can cost 750,000 coins, and the ammo isn't easy to get, but they do up to 30 hitpoints of damage with each shot. When you've got an important mine like this one to protect, it's worth the expense.
textByHashes.9d859ff979ac43781dafc2d55da7a772b1ca6cbb: You're welcome. Now please let me get on with my guard duties.
textByHashes.7cbead491130f001bc0338d9b91cd33121f7e63b: Yes, I heard. Now please let me get on with my guard duties.
textByHashes.9b332f1e0b62e93e813d7b8c99e5cb543e1a4264: The area under the palace is going to be excavated soon, and I'm guarding the entrance to it.
textByHashes.30ec407d4b85dcca2938e09a638e63b74c1f35f6: There's not even a rope to let you down there. You'd break both your legs if you tried it.
textByHashes.a8138f5b72b4d94de55fc83b5821c274fe6e9578: Still, the Queen says it should be safe, and I'm to let you go back down if you want.
textByHashes.72b2195f0a3cc73d7633b8f8ca0e20a816ba6a62: Stand back. This area is restricted.
textByHashes.641b7ed2962b45faf27bc699e591f48bd779b4a9: I do not care for wealth. Now move along.
textByHashes.aa8a2e4b8bfa36f9bd4c53299f48fee4741e98ff: No one is allowed past I'm afraid.
textByHashes.b6c80781491679d704f2572a1ed6b7b7749511b6: What do you think you're doing?
textByHashes.7d2c8ca384d2e3cdf0dcaf7fbabf115ddeba4199: I'M SORRY I'VE BEEN SHOUTING INSULTS SO LONG I CAN'T HELP IT!
textByHashes.95cc66f34d10b8ba994c5421742d2ff5b1aa1eda: THE TOWER IN NEITIZNOT. THEY SHOUT INSULTS BACK.
textByHashes.0e9d31eaee1f00bcb17a27145974bb7733a47d5b: You're free to go into the dungeons, your Highness.
textByHashes.ec2ea2abac21a372fb2a220a4b85e28077063676: Try not to get eaten by those monsters.
textByHashes.0464cb09607b16dff2f9deb65edb2db831d66e86: Halt! Are you here to sabotage the Motherlode Mine?
textByHashes.59129de4301ca482e73f16d1d4baa7fc1ef904e1: Prospector Percy discovered unusual mineral veins in this cave. Now he's built a machine to let us extract useful ores.
textByHashes.e91e8da353c3c94bd63da9124fd56c877157c97e: Percy calls it the Motherlode. I don't know why, and I'm not asking - that's between him and his mother.
textByHashes.75db134cf55f922d6b6b31eca397e51898fe1074: Dwarves don't normally let humans claim areas of the mine like this, but Percy's machine is really useful, so we struck a deal.
textByHashes.fca229532fda168502dc7e21d10e961a214ef4f8: That's a relief. Have a nice day.
textByHashes.2e8a987544331697f9961b87a587effe4b757b50: I said stay there, outerlander! You are not welcome in our camp.
textByHashes.8ced0f89871b16cc6d075bbcd1e0557f81588cee: Our camp, outerlander, and we don't want any trouble there.
textByHashes.01f1c889690afd92e2b657b9d0c31b963b1a595f: Hey, how did you get here?
textByHashes.f00f354cc279467307d49348e4008021e5ad28ea: Feel free to come in and see the highlight of our culture, outerlander.
textByHashes.2eac3e260dcce4cc18db23e5b00caa244a2e7d35: Ah, this is a strange ritual that has been going on for generations.
textByHashes.3a55ebdc2ecac25ebae3d9cd1612242132535c75: One of our clan stands on this tower and shouts insults at the other side.
textByHashes.47ba694bab8848a7231c75c852450096b08372d2: He suggested stopping it, but there was resistance from the rest of the village. We find it therapeutic.
textByHashes.828350ebe21796c524ff608d043b51bbf6f7cfbf: But you shouldn't be here - be off with you!
textByHashes.5b0292124cbf95f0769c0cab2a9128453cb4e724: Mighty? You look like another of those silly adventurers who thinks they're the bee's knees just because they've done a few lousy quests!
textByHashes.c4a5e63bd1d8f3d568e25d9ced1c4af99769ca29: I'll have you know it's a very important job guarding this jail!
textByHashes.b52d23802bbce8e6a9d057499bb5ab2f9f42afac: If anyone comes sneaking in here to mess around with the prisoners, the lads downstairs will make mincemeat of them, and I'll be here to pick them off if they try to escape.
textByHashes.52fda66a725e262bd40a3d22b79f4f39c8e6c407: So who am I talking to?
textByHashes.1264f8b5d6e4737913a3facfe9e51b9df244af32: But... but... you're standing right there...
textByHashes.e3ce226111b1631157d95369439876458df9f07d: Mmmm... big pint of beer... kebab...
textByHashes.5961c4d6ee0dcbd617e201a49c0862a32c3bd869: I'm afraid not. The city is on lockdown until the rebel elves are dealt with.
textByHashes.d07704c4c524f61d7e1603168015357c140f35f6: Rules are rules. No one enters until the criminals are gone.
textByHashes.251196beca09872cccbcea08f310ee6ef75a915e: Mind your tongue human. Our great city may be lost to us but that doesn't give you an excuse to talk like that.
textByHashes.6b2c54371747b4db9e85e3209b428650b5d065f0: Greetings, traveller. Enjoy your time at the Ranging Guild.
textByHashes.191312e2125c128c3bc1e74c493c8a50be0bb494: Hey! Get your hands off there!
textByHashes.086ee6eb4b81748458e481270f7c1126374ff6a9: The Sinclairs are under house arrest for crimes against a crown, and it's all thanks to you.
textByHashes.fad6aa2a525f2076bb2f226e83381389efcf1f14: Something's happening in the party room!
textByHashes.c867ee502d4ae2015c97f79712b32d16ae31dd23: Everyone get to the party room!
textByHashes.554c0b3373f8a950084c152f7a74034decb1054b: What's happening in the party room?
textByHashes.7063e9aab6ee66bf02d3b5cc19ad0186aca1fe7c: Get to the party room NOW!
textByHashes.82b6c1de93b3cc2c9c5900f73dac304d73c6580e: Get to the party room quick!
textByHashes.7fa8ced345fd888ea1e0dfc6600a0618683f518d: Big value items in the party room now!
textByHashes.435f720e7200b358882db130256e630747329c74: Quick! Get to the party room!
textByHashes.324fe91fae18bc1f73f68664866b4dd677283e62: Sorry, you can't come in here.
textByHashes.c225fac0bc60b3b4ee6f90cb653cb7eef68952a1: Welcome! Would you like to go into the Dig Site archaeology cleaning area?
textByHashes.558cf27713e13dae12f1651709c77219400dd08c: Sorry, you can't come in here unless you've completed the Dig Site quest.
textByHashes.b3f585fcef5a866475e2569280a4170fe28f2d18: Hold up there, workman coming through! You'll have to wait a moment; don't want to fall into that wheelbarrow!
textByHashes.32c54ed2d460b3c733ee514f6a474f615a840156: I'm trying to observe a suspect. Leave me alone!
textByHashes.2ad6478744b08da2bb7003afb30b7b5adf4343a8: Hadn't you heard? You'd better go and talk to the other guard, the one by the bank door. He'll tell you all about it.
textByHashes.7b35e0715ab1059ff58a61deba9523f8cb8ecbcf: Go on, ask him what's wrong with the bank wall. He loves when people ask him that.
textByHashes.4a1a7b78096c3445ccb636e84e11c26d92508749: Yes, that's right. We're keeping the suspect under tight observation for the moment.
textByHashes.644dcc3ea29aaf9b8e3821fde28208f26febf4fc: I'm not meant to discuss the case. You know what confidentiality rules are like.
textByHashes.d7ce93cd9f03f5341b24da8d19664f99eb8c4696: I'd be doing a lot better if nits like you didn't come crowding around me all day!
textByHashes.ce335bd6646b453edb58ec4a1cab1430da6d7c76: That's very kind of you. I'd rather like a nice bowl of stew, if you could fetch me one. I don't get many meal breaks.
textByHashes.662c7bfa759e1f4843a4b7ba9cf68f1c26fb6e4d: Yes, what do you... I say, is that stew for me?
textByHashes.25ce12a61a783a34012c206dc47da97bf399ffe3: Gosh, that's very kind of you! Here, have a few coins for your trouble...
textByHashes.18c8818ae116b050d264aa44f9be6461df64a55c: Fair enough. But if you change your mind, I'll probably still be here.
textByHashes.56e634bdfa959694103e8925be867e7b51bc3bc3: Why the demoninikin are you waving THAT at me?
textByHashes.a9a76e44dbc827d3529f8986c100fd1374cc2039: Erm... No thanks! Now, if you don't mind, I'm trying to observe this suspect!
textByHashes.900cbc6394357136e6331f87600db57ef948fe4a: Watch what you're doing with that axe, you nit!
textByHashes.08401b2d11ba70a6d2b8b528f0bbd5102e3f0a5d: You'll blow my cover! I'm meant to be hidden!
textByHashes.763228878879e10ed50fc79bbd661971572eb364: Hello, human. What can I do for you?
textByHashes.fd8fb82dde34bd3b0e92da015ee1aab7a9ca3e04: Protecting the camp from wildlife and thieves.
textByHashes.c829a1e0b25e145073a729cd4285d269dc7b8608: Hah! Why would I rush up there when you foolish humans are more than willing to throw yourself into its jaws?
textByHashes.3c561dadc5273a16fbb9567ede4fc98b7ef12283: Besides, someone needs to keep an eye on the happenings down here.
textByHashes.d6ec1766fc5125bf62c58664fb59474f4afbeeee: It is hungry work though, and we don't have the most interesting supplies up here.
textByHashes.9816c05021a1f6d3e215f3c416f66feac0be91f3: Got me thinking about those sunlight antelope. Quite an interesting flavour, but I think we can do even more...
textByHashes.e77e065538524819a1d28641aee1a3e3a6ae7446: Anyway, I shouldn't really be talking to you. Move along, please.
textByHashes.fc8f5f81fef6d057011f608a5326a538a696f453: Oh, is that sunlight antelope meat you're carrying?
textByHashes.16d71532aa1588003d8bc3b684b9be7a8d53a948: Come closer, I have a request to make.
textByHashes.2ffcb31ec625385a3fe441456f0a94ab4dfe5cba: Sitting up here under the looming threat of death at the jaws of a giant beast that tunnels beneath our very feet got me thinking.
textByHashes.bb243f70f169d1d4c5d6ffa2248917bac30a76c6: Could we combine the sweet stickiness of redberries with the strong, gamey flavour of sunlight antelope?
textByHashes.91a7faf2cf79c6f32d11a5fcc0a93860afcf92a7: Don't get me wrong, Marla is cooking up some wonderful stuff considering the circumstances. I just need something a little more adventurous, you know?
textByHashes.19596e1292f05fc4029d8e95262d3509e3c458c1: I'm sure she'd be happy to experiment if you bring her some raw sunlight antelope and redberries!
textByHashes.52c32d0c65ad23da1c323365d64585c9935b48d2: Wonderful, thank you! I can't wait to try this!
textByHashes.d268c4d4b00446d4472fedef94ddc497f0d18b94: Aren't we all? Ah well, maybe another time.
textByHashes.5230a7df5e526fa5c1ace53c619d7fde2066cda6: Hello! What can I do for you?
textByHashes.abb98bf312e573f266156eff4771a852065f563f: I'd like to try redberries combined with sunlight antelope! Marla the chef will prepare it if you take her the raw ingredients.
